module:
Unit tests for vector capability negotiation system.

These tests verify the behavior of capability negotiation between
consumers and providers, ensuring proper matching, fallback behavior,
and type handling.

test_exact_capability_match.docstring: Test negotiation when exact capabilities are requested.

test_intersection_capability_match.docstring: Test negotiation when multiple capabilities are requested and some match.

test_fallback_for_empty_intersection.docstring: Test fallback behavior when capability intersection is empty.

test_return_type_handling.docstring: Test correct type handling based on CAPABILITY_RETURN_MODES.

test_nested_capability_handling.docstring: Test negotiation of nested capability structures.

test_cross_backend_consistency.docstring: Test that capability negotiation is consistent across backends.

test_capability_provider_selection.docstring: Test selecting providers based on capabilities.
